meta.notes:
DRAWING-ONLY fixture. No NCS-issued quote exists. Validation flow: Sean/Jay builds in V2; V2-generated quote is Jay-validated; per-component delta against ncsImpliedBreakdown is informational. EXPECTED total fields are sentinel zeros — no NCS-issued quote exists. ncsImpliedBreakdown IS populated (where evidence permits) and is the basis for Jay validation.

=== THREE-DOCUMENT CHAIN ===

1. ARCHITECT DRAWING — WD.2100.2 Mydas Type A1-3 Kitchen & Wet Area Details Revision T1 (Gardner Vaughan Group, For Tender, Aug 2023).
   Shows Kitchen Plan + 6 elevations, Bathroom Plan + 5 elevations, Ensuite Plan + 5 elevations, Laundry Plan + 1 elevation. 1:50 scale rendering.
   Mydas Type A1-3 = Type A apartments, units 1, 2 and 3 (3 identical apartments × Type A layout).
   Project: Bask Bokarina, Lot 902 Bokarina Boulevard, Bokarina.

2. FINISHES SCHEDULE — TWO candidates in the corpus:
   FS.06 Linen Deluxe Revision 1 (Aug 2023):
     Kitchen: 20mm Stone Ambassador White Burst (WB 1200), 2mm arris edge, 20mm joinery overhang.
     Study/Bathroom/Ensuite/Laundry: same Ambassador White Burst.
     Single stone for entire apartment.
   FS.08 Linen Premium Revision 1 (Aug 2023):
     Kitchen + Walk-in Pantry: 20mm Stone Ambassador Carrara Mist (CM 1453), 40mm apron/mitred edges to straight benches, 2mm arris edge.
     Study/Bath/Ensuite/Laundry/Powder: 20mm Stone Ambassador White Truffle (WT 1395), 2mm arris edge.
     Two stones across the apartment + 40mm apron mitre on kitchen.
   AMBIGUOUS: which schedule applies to Mydas Type A1-3? The drawing carries no FS reference. Bask is a multi-finish development (Linen Deluxe vs Linen Premium are explicit tiers); different unit Types (A/B/C/D) likely map to different schedules. Resolving the link would need Jay or another email in the Bask training set (6 emails total in this drop; only 2 used here).

3. ALPHA SURFACES CATALOG Mar26 (Northcoast Stone customer pricing).
   Result: stone chain BREAKS at this step — Ambassador (White Burst, Carrara Mist, White Truffle) is NOT in the Alpha Surfaces catalog. Ambassador is a different stone supplier (separate manufacturer/distributor; Q23111 also used 'Stone Ambassador Zenith Premium Range', confirming Ambassador is the customer's preferred non-Alpha brand for premium tiers).
   Materials.total therefore null — chain breaks at Alpha Surfaces, needs Ambassador price list.

=== BUILD-SPEC FOR ONE TYPE A UNIT (× 3 = 1, 2, 3) ===

Per the drawing, each Type A unit has stone benchtops in:
  - Kitchen (1 sink + 1 cooktop + walk-around joinery; sink is undermount per FS schedules)
  - Bathroom (1 vanity with above-counter basin → tap hole only)
  - Ensuite (1 vanity with above-counter basin → tap hole only)
  - Laundry (1 stainless steel tub — drop-in/inset-style, tap hole drilled in stone per FS.08)

Piece-level cut dimensions are NOT machine-extractable from the rendered drawing image. The architect drawing is at 1:50 with overall room dimensions visible (e.g. kitchen ~5500mm overall length, bathroom ~1300mm, etc.) but per-piece stone cut sizes (which depend on cabinet layout decisions made by NCS at template stage) are not on this drawing. Cutting and polishing Lm therefore left null in the implied breakdown — derivation of those fields would require either (a) higher-resolution drawing access, (b) Jay's interpretation of the layout, or (c) NCS's measure-stage drawings.

=== ncsImpliedBreakdown DERIVATION (1 unit × 3, where evidence permits) ===

Materials:
  null. Stone is Ambassador (White Burst per FS.06, or Carrara Mist + White Truffle per FS.08) — not in Alpha Surfaces catalog. Chain breaks; needs Ambassador price list from Northcoast.
  Provenance: 'Stone is Ambassador (per FS.06 White Burst WB 1200, or per FS.08 Carrara Mist CM 1453 + White Truffle WT 1395) — not in Alpha Surfaces catalog Mar26. Broken chain; needs Ambassador price list. Also AMBIGUOUS: which finishes schedule (FS.06 vs FS.08) applies to Type A1-3.'

Cutting:
  null. Per-piece stone cut dimensions not machine-extractable from architect tender drawing.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — 20mm cut $17.50/Lm; rate is in evidence but Lm not derivable from this drawing. Per-piece dims need NCS measure-stage drawing or Jay.'

Polishing:
  null. Same reason as cutting.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — 20mm polish $45.00/Lm; rate is in evidence but seen-edge Lm not derivable from this drawing. Note: FS.08 specifies 40mm apron/mitred edges for the kitchen — that maps to V2 mitred-edge profile (MITERED_EDGE_ID), and the polish rate would actually be 40mm $115/Lm not 20mm $45/Lm for those edges. Splitting 20mm vs 40mm rates would require knowing which schedule applies.'

Cutouts (Beau standard $65; undermount sink $300):
  Per unit: 1× Undermount kitchen sink (Argent Tempo 450mm or 670mm 1¾ — both undermount per both FS schedules) $300 + 1× Cooktop $65 + 1× Bathroom vanity tap hole (above-counter basin — Fienza Reba per FS.06 / Fienza Antonia per FS.08 → tap-hole only) $65 + 1× Ensuite vanity tap hole $65 + 1× Laundry tub cutout (Argent Format 390 narrow stainless tub — drop-in/inset, AMBIGUOUS whether undermount or inset) $65 = $560/unit. Treat laundry tub as standard $65 conservatively.
  3 units × $560 = $1,680.00, 15 cutouts.
  Provenance: 'Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27: undermount sink $300 (Argent Tempo per both FS schedules), standard cutout $65 each (cooktop, 2× above-counter basin tap holes, laundry tub — laundry tub mount type AMBIGUOUS, treated as standard); 5 cutouts × 3 identical Type A units'.

Installation:
  null. Beau rate sheet did not include an installation rate. For multi-unit construction with site coordination, this is likely a substantial component.
  Provenance: 'Not in Beau rate sheet 2026-01-27 — needs Jay'.

Templating:
  Distance Kunda Park HQ (20 Hitech Drive, Kunda Park) → Lot 902 Bokarina Boulevard, Bokarina ≈ 5 km (Bokarina is on the Sunshine Coast, immediately adjacent to Kunda Park area). Local zone. $150 + $2.00 × 5 = $160.00. Required=true (multi-unit construction always requires templating).
  Provenance: 'V2 hardcoded TEMPLATING_RATE, distance approx via Google Maps (Kunda Park to Bokarina is local Sunshine Coast)'.

Delivery:
  5 km → Local zone. $50 + $2.50 × 5 = $62.50.
  Provenance: 'V2 hardcoded DELIVERY_ZONES (Local zone), distance approx via Google Maps'.

=== V3-CONCEPT GAPS SURFACED ===
  1. Drawing-only inverse usage — V2 must support 'build a quote from drawings' workflow (no NCS quote to reconcile against).
  2. Multi-unit identical-Type pricing (qty 3 × Type A) — same as Q23113 multi-unit gap.
  3. Multi-finish-schedule selection (FS.06 vs FS.08) — V2 needs to handle finish schedule as a selectable input.
  4. 40mm apron/mitred kitchen edge per FS.08 — different rate band ($115/Lm) than 20mm ($45/Lm). V2 edge model should price by rate band.
  5. Ambassador stone supplier — separate price chain from Alpha Surfaces. V2 catalog needs to support multiple stone suppliers.

=== AMBIGUOUS ITEMS ===
  - Which finishes schedule applies (FS.06 Linen Deluxe vs FS.08 Linen Premium)? Blocks materials and edge-rate decisions.
  - Per-piece stone cut dimensions — not on tender drawing.
  - Laundry tub mount type — undermount or drop-in?
  - Address precision — 'Lot 902 Bokarina Boulevard' is the lot reference; final street number may differ on built address.
